title: CAST from DOUBLE to INTEGER sometimes returns 1, sometimes 2
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_double(a REAL, b INTEGER);
SELECT CAST(a AS INTEGER) FROM test_double;
SELECT CAST(CAST(a AS REAL) AS INTEGER) FROM test_double;
SELECT CAST(1.9 AS INTEGER) FROM test_double;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent CAST from DOUBLE to INTEGER
